prestazioni: M120 V12 6.0L engine (120.990) upgraded with a custom billet crankshaft from Manley Performance (stroke increased to 88mm for 6.6L displacement), forged Mahle Motorsport pistons (10.5:1 CR), and Carrillo H-beam connecting rods for 800+ HP reliability under forced induction

Twin Precision Turbo PT6766CE turbochargers with custom 3D-printed Inconel turbine housings (designed by TurboSmart for the F200's unique exhaust manifold geometry) and TiAL MV-R 44mm wastegates with ceramic-coated internals for reduced lag and 2.2 bar peak boost

Full Motec M150 ECU with custom CAN bus integration for the F200's active aerodynamics (including rear wing and front diffuser actuation), paired with a Plex Knock Monitor for real-time ignition timing adjustments and a Bosch Motorsport 0280158003 high-flow fuel pump system with dual AEM 340lph pumps
estetica: Custom Rocket Bunny F200-specific widebody kit (carbon fiber front fenders with integrated NACA ducts for brake cooling, rear overfenders with 50mm extended wheel arches, and a 3-piece rear bumper with a diffuser that mimics the original concept's 'floating' design)

BBS LM-R 19x12 front / 20x14 rear wheels (ET +12/+5 offset) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30/19 front, 345/25/20 rear) with custom center-lock adapters for the F200's unique hub design, paired with AP Racing CP9460-3600 6-piston front / 4-piston rear calipers and 380mm carbon-ceramic rotors

Full custom interior by Status Racing featuring a carbon fiber monocoque bucket seat with Schroth 6-point harnesses, a MOMO Prototipo steering wheel with integrated Motec C127 dash display, and a rear roll cage designed by Safety Devices (UK) with integrated air jack points and a fire suppression system by Lifeline
